column1: # BRT/DD trace points for Dune dedicated-server build 1988751.
# These are image/file-relative offsets proven from the 1988751 binary. They are
# not a full BRT call graph.
# - ServerRequestBaseBackup string at 0x5a553f9 relocates into metadata table
# - The adjacent native exec thunk is 0xd1093f0.
# - The thunk dispatches through UBuildingReplicationComponent vtable offset
#   0x588; the relocation-applied vtable entry at 0x15214a18 is 0xd109ff0.
# - The hotbar profile uses current-build function entries that precede mutated
#   decision bytes, so tracefs uprobes do not overwrite runtime canary patches.
